headline: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Supply Chain Finance Platform Selected by Glencore for $2.55B Program
summary: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE:FIS) is one of the best low priced technology stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On May 12, FIS announced that its Supply Chain Finance Platform, formerly known as Demica, was selected by Glencore PLC to power an inaugural $2.55 billion trade receivables securitization program for its oil and […]
